description_long: This is a dark blue paper grocery bag with a starry night sky pattern and prominent white text on both large faces. The text reads 'Noche Abierta' and 'Gaua Zabalik', accompanied by a keyhole graphic and additional smaller text, suggesting it is branded for a special event or promotion. The bag features two sturdy loop handles made of matching blue material, attached to the top for easy carrying. The sides of the bag are plain with the same starry pattern, and the bag appears to be empty, maintaining a crisp, angular shape. The surface finish is matte with a slight sheen, and the bag is constructed from thick, reinforced paper or light cardboard. No groceries or items are visible inside or protruding from the bag.
description: A dark blue paper grocery bag with a starry pattern, white event branding, and blue loop handles. The bag is empty and has a crisp, angular shape.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main branding, event text, and keyhole graphic on a starry blue background.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain starry pattern and the bag's angular, folded structure.
description_view_2: Back view with identical branding and text as the front, maintaining the same starry design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the plain starry pattern and the bag's folded side panels.
attribute_branding_or_logo: Yes, white event branding with 'Noche Abierta', 'Gaua Zabalik', and a keyhole graphic.
